summary: The notebook currently has two notes: a foundational gradient-descent course note and a structured reading of the Transformer paper.

areas.label: Machine Learning
areas.coverage: Covers gradient descent basics: the update rule, a worked quadratic example, and learning-rate failure modes.
areas.gap: Only the first ML Foundations note exists; momentum, Adam, and further optimization methods are not yet covered.

areas.label: Deep Learning
areas.coverage: Covers the Transformer architecture: self-attention, multi-head attention, positional encodings, and WMT 2014 results.
areas.gap: No notes yet on later Transformer variants, sub-quadratic attention, or training-stability and scaling recipes.
